items.title: Insert + verify the 92 legacy redirect rows
steps: 1. Run backfill.sql (transactional INSERT ... SELECT + ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING)
2. Verify counts (91 article rows + 1 contact-us; project total 41 -> 133)
4. Follow one chain end-to-end to a 200
items.expected: Every inserted from_path 301s to a 200 target on the live site
items.evidence: INSERT 0 91 + INSERT 0 1, zero conflicts, project total 133. Five samples (dentist-gainesville-insider-tips, root-canals-near-me, endodontist-near-me, how-do-tooth-infections-happen, contact-us/gainesville-office-coming-soon) all 301 to correct targets; full chain for dentist-gainesville-insider-tips ends 200 at /articles/dentist-gainesville-insider-tips. SQL preserved at backfill.sql in this folder.
items.notes: Redirects appeared after the redirect cache's natural 5-min TTL, not via ?nocache=1 — discovered the deployed cache-bust's pattern flush is silently broken (KEYS disabled on the cluster Redis, error swallowed). Fix scoped into plans/07022026-renderer-seo-hardening.
